preparedWith.title: Rest & Readiness
preparedWith.description: Get enough sleep before the hike or ride, eat properly, and start only when your body feels ready for the route.

preparedWith.title: Food & Water
preparedWith.description: Enough water, electrolytes, trail snacks, emergency calories, and a plan for refilling if possible.

preparedWith.title: Navigation
preparedWith.description: Save the route offline, bring a map or backup navigation, and tell someone your planned route and expected return time.

preparedWith.title: Repair & Weather
preparedWith.description: Basic tools, spare tube or patch kit, rain layer, sun protection, and clothing for changing conditions.

preparedWith.title: Power
preparedWith.description: Extra batteries, charged phone, lights, GPS or watch power, and a small power bank for longer days.

preparedWith.title: Emergency Info
preparedWith.description: Carry identification, emergency contact details, a little cash, and any important medical information in an easy-to-find place.
